title: helichrysum rufescens
intro: Helichrysum rufescens, also known as yellow everlast, is a flowering plant species native to Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant's essential oil contains compounds that exhibit antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms associated with arthritis, digestive issues, and skin conditions. Helichrysum rufescens is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oil, capsules, and teas, and is also used topically to soothe burns, cuts, and bruises.
